title: Texture Trail
description: A sensorial matching game where kids pair two things that feel the same: soft, hard, bumpy, smooth, fluffy, or prickly.
learningGoals: Build texture vocabulary through paired examples
Connect touch words with familiar objects
Extend the game into a real-room texture hunt
interactionModel: match-pairs tap cards that share a texture
feedbackModel: Correct pairs get pop and sparkle SFX plus a spoken texture line; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
